# Kaiser Klowns

> Kaiser Klowns is a luxury creative conglomerate managing five distinct Houses: Maventine, Anthovai, KurenTengu, Velvessence Studios, and Lokovox Media. Founded in September 2025 and headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Kaiser Klowns operates under the philosophy of "We don't build brands. We architect legacies."

## About

Kaiser Klowns Group is a creative conglomerate dedicated to the long-term development of each of its Houses, preserving their identity, heritage, and creative excellence. Each House operates with full creative independence while sharing a commitment to excellence and innovation.

- Website: https://www.kaiserklowns.group
- Contact: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/contact
- Careers: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/careers
- Press: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/press
- Founded: September 2025
- Headquarters: Bangkok, Thailand
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138424910

## Houses (Sub-brands)

### Maventine
- Description: Luxury Fashion House specializing in high-end fashion and street-tailoring
- Status: Coming Soon
- Focus: Premium clothing, accessories, and lifestyle products
- URL: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/houses/maventine

### Anthovai
- Description: Technology and AI company — the technological backbone of Kaiser Klowns Group
- Status: Active
- Focus: AI platforms, enterprise software, cloud infrastructure, and automation
- Services: AI chatbot development, ERP systems, HRIS, CRM, cloud migration (AWS/GCP), CI/CD setup, e-commerce portals, cybersecurity frameworks
- Key Products: Arkai Work Assistant (AI-powered LINE workspace integration), Aello IDE, Alfa ERP, KlownsNexus Office Suite
- Arkai: An AI assistant for LINE groups that automatically captures files, summarizes tasks, and retains conversation context for teams
- Clients include: Roi Et Rajabhat University (web application), Indorama (e-learning platform), Digital Nova (digital marketing platform), PMY Services (corporate service portal)
- URL: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/houses/Anthovai

### KurenTengu
- Description: Game and interactive entertainment studio — mythology-driven game worlds
- Status: Coming Soon
- Focus: Games that tell truths through mythology-driven interactive experiences
- URL: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/houses/kurentengu

### Velvessence Studios
- Description: Film, music, and visual production studio — visual stories of emotion
- Status: Coming Soon
- Focus: Brand film, cinematic production, and art direction
- URL: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/houses/velvessence

### Lokovox Media
- Description: In-house marketing and branding agency that also serves external clients
- Status: Active
- Focus: Brand strategy, content creation, advertising campaigns, media planning, corporate identity design
- Services: Full-service brand strategy, content creation (video, poster, multimedia), Corporate Identity (CI) design including logo and brand books, viral social media campaigns, influencer marketing, digital marketing
- Notable work: Viral campaigns generating over 10 million organic reach within a single month
- URL: https://www.kaiserklowns.group/houses/lokovox

## Services Available for External Clients

### Anthovai — Technology Services
- AI chatbot and automation development for LINE and web platforms
- Custom ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) systems
- HRIS (Human Resources Information System) web applications
- Custom CRM and lead management portals
- Cloud migration from local servers to AWS or GCP
- CI/CD pipeline setup and DevOps
- Custom B2B e-commerce portals with accounting software integration
- Cybersecurity frameworks for digital asset protection
- Corporate e-learning platforms
- Clinic and queue management applications
- Internal knowledge base chatbots

### Lokovox Media — Creative Services
- Brand strategy for startups, SMEs, and enterprise
- Corporate Identity (CI) design: logo, color palette, typography, brand book
- Social media strategy and content creation
- Influencer and KOL campaign management
- Video production: brand film, promotional, editorial
- Digital marketing campaigns across social and traditional channels
